cases.name: Full Sprint Run: output tree + report + 0.25 pass + 0.35 no-gold + Phase I skipped + no Y/Z
No ASR -> client RAW/TIDY generated, AssemblyAI RAW/TIDY skipped
Missing input -> blocked, names the missing file
Corrupted TextGrid (dropped interval) -> gold replay FAILS, not pass
